name: Nuwa

skills.name: Divine Consciousness
skills.description: Gains enhanced vision and range when leveling up.

skills.name: Divine Glow - Creation
skills.description: Unleashes energy that deals damage, knocks back enemies, and creates a matrix. When the energy stops, it expands to deal extra damage.

skills.name: Divine Glow - Coalescence
skills.description: Creates a matrix and allows her to teleport. The matrix blocks enemy heroes' movement. Matrices can be fused twice.

skills.name: Divine Glow - Emergence
skills.description: Teleports to the target area after a short delay. Generates a shield, gains Movement Speed, deals damage, and slows the enemy. Passive: Magical Attack can reduce cast time.

tips: Nuwa (Mage): Tier A on international ranked — 51.54% WR.
Build core: Boots of the Arcane, Venomous Staff, Insatiable Tome.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.54%, pick 0.83%, ban 0.42%, popularity tier A.
Counters Mulan, Nakoruru, Pei · Weak into Liu Bei, Mayene, Mulan.

faqs.question: Is Nuwa good in current season?
faqs.answer: Nuwa is Tier A Mage with 51.54% win rate, 0.83% pick rate, and 0.42% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Nuwa build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of the Arcane, Venomous Staff, Insatiable Tome, Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath, Frozen Breath. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Nuwa?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Nuwa: Liu Bei, Mayene, Mulan. Nuwa is strong into Mulan, Nakoruru, Pei.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mulan, Nakoruru, Pei. Countered by: Liu Bei, Mayene, Mulan.
